svg.text: Portfolio Analyst Dashboard — Power BI Mockup
as of 06:45 PT · Jul 1 gas day
Western system schematic — flows to PG&E Citygate
Basin pricing with 30-day sparklines · transport costs · utilization · citygate disposition (MMcf/d)
Illustrative snapshot — sparklines show trailing 30 days · live tiles bind to SharePoint current/ data · supply 2,740 = demand 2,740 MMcf/d
Weather outlook — HDD / CDD, service-area composite
Daily HDDs (navy) drive core load · CDDs (light) for EG context — composite temps 74–82 °F
Bound to pipeline_health log — Teams alert fires on failure or stale data
Mockup — all values illustrative, for layout discussion only
